summary: During Anti-Personnel Training, Kim Hajin is uniquely pitted against an instructor due to his unfinished training firearm, where he demonstrates his predictive abilities. He later navigates an interaction with Yoo Yeonhai, asserting his boundaries while also observing her character traits. Realizing the limitations of minor character interactions for gaining skill points, Kim Hajin resolves to integrate himself into the upcoming "Djinn Attack on the National Weapon Museum," a crucial main story event involving key characters, to further his objectives.
key_moments: Kim Hajin undergoes an intense Anti-Personnel Training session against an instructor, showcasing his 'thousand-mile eyes' skill.
Kim Hajin interacts with Yoo Yeonhai, rejecting her casual approach and identifying her hidden character setting related to junk food.
Kim Hajin decides to strategically insert himself into the 'Djinn Attack on the National Weapon Museum' main story arc to earn significant skill points.
